transcript: Group F with the world champions Germany facing South Korea Kattam on the pigeons if it went in Neuer didn't grab it and nearly Germany were made to pay the price what a nervy moment South Korean cross takes a bit of defending Son Heung-min on the volley, it was inviting for him. That's the German corner, Goretzka got a header to it, Werner cut it back again, and Hummels! Spread wide here, Kimmich's found a little bit of space, Plenty of green shirts to bring down here. And a fantastic save. Ozil, a clever little flick. Return ball. Nice stuff, this, from Germany. Werner! But Ozil to play. One in! And still, they can't make it count flick towards the near post bouncing around dangerously and South Korea have scored can you believe it Germany are going out of this World Cup Kim Yong-gwon he's going over to have a look at it's taking some time this oh it touches the defender doesn't it the way through, it touches Zula. Has that played him onside? The goal counts. Germany are going home from this World Cup. Neuer now is playing as a midfield player. There's going to be another goal here. This will be it. Song Jungmin. 2--0 that is it but their world cup is over they are bottom of the group they've lost two group games for the first time in history 2-0 to south korea incredible We'll see you next time.
